description: The page presents several percentages for different adoption states, sectors and business sizes; a candidate without its population and measure is ambiguous.
notes: Do not choose a percentage unless its subject and survey population are preserved. Owner review pending.

description: The risk table places multiple risks beside multiple mitigating outcomes in a layout whose row relationships require careful confirmation.
notes: Route unclear row-level pairings to review rather than infer a mitigation relationship. Owner review pending.

description: A contributed case study describes an implementation; it must not be generalized into a government-wide finding or policy claim.
notes: Preserve the case-study subject and reject unsupported generalization. Owner review pending.

description: A third-party global survey statistic is contextual evidence and must not be represented as the publisher's own Scotland-specific finding.
notes: Do not detach third-party statistics from their cited population or attribute them to the strategy publisher. Owner review pending.

description: The annual-publication requirement does not state an effective start date on the evidence page.
notes: Do not infer an effective date from publication metadata. Owner review pending.

description: The regulatory-assurance-body recommendation does not state an implementation date on the evidence page.
notes: Preserve the missing implementation date rather than inventing one. Owner review pending.
